'''Tapani Starship Cooperative''' was the manufacturer of the [[Tapani-class carrier|''Tapani''-class Carrier]], the [[Tapani-class assault frigate|''Tapani''-class Assault frigate]] and the [[Manta-class assault starfighter|''Manta''-class starfighters]]. [[Tex Vandale]] was an executive of this company.

{{Company-stub}}
